---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is, e.g.
*I want to add a "<feature>" so that the user can "<do something>"*

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features
you've considered.

## Which Auslogics BoostSpeed tool does this mirror (if any)?

If your feature mirrors a tool Auslogics BoostSpeed ships, naming it helps
us match the de-facto expectation. (e.g. "Like Auslogics' *My Disk Space*
tile but with a breakdown by file type.")

## Additional context

Any other context (screenshots, similar projects, etc.) about the feature request.
